title: Checkbox Automations and Usability

posts.author: dlawrencer24 (Dan Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using a checkbox, would be very helpful to be able to do an automation using a Checkbox column and whether or not it is clicked OR auto clearing of a checkbox column once a given date has passed.

Also, when looking at resourcing, would be helpful to use a checkbox or other means to run scenarios for resource analysis (if we take on this project, then here is what happens to our resources).
